response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically strong and versatile senior individual contributor with 15+ years of experience across many stacks and a genuine open-source track record, but he falls short on several hard requirements for this role. Most critically, German proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' well below the C1 minimum required for a client-facing leadership role at a German IT consultancy. Beyond the language barrier, the resume shows no formal evidence of team leadership, IT architecture documentation (UML), Python, security/risk/compliance expertise, or executive-level project management — all of which are central to the Head of Development position.
strengths: Exceptional technical breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud systems over 15+ years with consistent senior/staff-level contributions
Demonstrated open-source commitment and Linux/Unix fluency through the GISCollective platform and multiple published libraries
Community educator with workshops, conference talks, and a Selenium training program — signals ability to mentor and transfer knowledge
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — this is a disqualifying gap for a C1-minimum role requiring daily client communication in German
No formal team leadership, headcount responsibility, or project management track record; all roles are individual contributor positions
No mention of UML, formal IT architecture methods, security/risk management, or compliance considerations — all explicitly required by the JD

key_factors.factor: Strong technical breadth and open-source track record
